questions.question: Which fundamental type of logic circuit has outputs that depend solely on its current inputs, with no memory of past inputs?
options: Sequential logic circuit
Asynchronous logic circuit
Combinational logic circuit
Synchronous logic circuit
Finite state machine

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a 'Reservation Station' in a processor implementing Tomasulo's algorithm for out-of-order execution?
options: To store the results of completed instructions before writing them back to the register file.
To buffer instructions that have finished execution but cannot yet commit.
To hold operands and the operation to be performed for instructions awaiting execution in a functional unit.
To predict the outcome of conditional branches.
To convert virtual addresses to physical addresses.

questions.question: In the context of physical design for an Integrated Circuit, what is 'routing' primarily concerned with?
options: Placing standard cells onto the silicon die.
Connecting the logical pins of cells with physical wires on the silicon layers.
Determining the optimal aspect ratio of the chip.
Generating the power and ground distribution network.
Verifying the logical equivalence of the netlist against the RTL.

questions.question: Which type of memory exhibits both non-volatility (retains data without power) and allows for individual byte-level modification (read/write) in modern embedded systems and storage, albeit typically slower than RAM?
options: SRAM (Static Random Access Memory)
DRAM (Dynamic Random Access Memory)
NVRAM (Non-Volatile Random Access Memory)
Flash Memory
Cache Memory

questions.question: In advanced processor architectures, what is 'speculative execution' primarily intended to achieve?
options: Reduce static power consumption by powering down idle units.
Ensure all instructions complete in program order to simplify recovery.
Improve performance by executing instructions before their control dependencies are resolved, reverting if incorrect.
Dynamically adjust the clock frequency based on workload.
Provide a secure execution environment for sensitive applications.
